Our Story · 我们的故事

千里香——福建馄饨老味道。店里每一只馄饨、水饺都是现包现下，从薄皮小馄饨到鲜虾蟹子云吞，皆是手工。

Qianlixiang — “fragrance that travels a thousand li” — is a Fujian wonton house. Every wonton and dumpling here is folded by hand and dropped to order, from thin-skin xiao wontons to shrimp-and-crab-roe.
